MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-09-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: REAL PARTY IN INTEREST CALIFORNIA & PIERCE APARTMENTS, L.P.'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/CERTIFICATION IS OVERRULED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER. ALTHOUGH THE COURT MAY PROPERLY TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE RENT BOARD DECISION, THE COURT MAY NOT ACCEPT AS TRUE THE RENT BOARD'S FINDINGS OF FACT ON ISSUES IN DISPUTE IN THE PRESENT CASE. FACTUAL ISSUES ARE NOT APPROPRIATELY RAISED AND DECIDED ON DEMURRER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED FILED BY PETITIONER MOLIERI, DANILO

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER DANILO MOLIERI'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTATTIVE MANDAMUS (CCP SECTIONS 1085, 1094.5) IS DENIED. THE RENT BOARD'S DECISION IS SUPPORTED BY SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE. FURTHERMORE, THERE IS NO LEGAL BASIS FOR IMPOSITION OF SF RENT BOARD REG. 16.14 FILING DEADLINE UNDER SF RENT BOARD REG. 16.11. (COURT INDICATED THAT JUDGMENT CAN BE ENTERED DENYING THE WRIT.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

LAW AND MOTION 302, REAL PARTY IN INTEREST CALIFORNIA & PIERCE APARTMENTS, L.P. DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - CONTINUED TO AUGUST 9, 2010. MOVING & OPPOSING PARTIES TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES TO DEPARTMENT 302 AS SOON AS POSSIBLE. PLEASE ATTACH COVER LETTER CONFIRMING NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Moton Of Hearing On Petition For Wrti Of Administattive Mandamus (Ccp 1085, 1094.5); Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Jan-18-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER DANILO MOLIERI'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTATTIVE MANDAMUS (CCP SECTIONS 1085, 1094.5).

APPEARANCES: James A. Lassart, Esq. 972-6303 & Stephen K. Lightfoot II, Esq. 972-6315 of Ropers, Majeski, Kohn & Bentley for petitioner & moving party; Francesca Gessner, Deputy City Atty 554-4762 for respondents & opposing parties; David P. Wasserman, Esq. of Wasserman-Stern 567-9600 for Real Party in Interest California & Pierce Apartments, LP & opposing party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS IS DENIED. THE RENT BOARD'S DECISION IS SUPPORTED BY SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE. FURTHERMORE, THERE IS NO LEGAL BASIS FOR IMPOSITION OF SF RENT BOARD REG. 16.14 FILING DEADLINE UNDER SF RENT BOARD REG. 16.11. (Court indicated that judgment can be entered denying the writ.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Aug-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David P. Wasserman of Wasserman-Stern (567.9600) for real party in interest and moving party; Stephen K. Lightfoot II of Ropers Majeski Kohn Bentley (972.6315) for petitioner and responding party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: REAL PARTY IN INTEREST CALIFORNIA & PIERCE APARTMENTS, L.P.'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/CERTIFICATION is overruled, 10 days leave to answer. Although the court may properly take judicial notice of the rent board decision, the court may not accept as true the rent board's findings of fact on issues in dispute in the present case. Factual issues are not appropriately raised and decided on demurrer. Order signed in open court. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Jul-29-2010 Continued To Aug-09-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
REAL PARTY IN INTEREST CALIFORNIA & PIERCE APARTMENTS, L.P. DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - CONTINUED TO AUGUST 9, 2010. MOVING & OPPOSING PARTIES TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES TO DEPARTMENT 302 AS SOON AS POSSIBLE. PLEASE ATTACH COVER LETTER CONFIRMING NEW HEARING DATE. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
